title: Acknowledgements: Assessment and diagnosis of FASD among adults: a national and international systematic review - Canada.ca
content:
## Acknowledgements: Assessment and diagnosis of FASD among adults: a national and international systematic review
Funding for this report was provided by the Public Health Agency of Canada. The report reflects the views of the authors and not necessarily those of the funders. The authors would like to acknowledge the support of the Faculty of Social Work, University of Calgary, particularly, Dr. Daniel Lai and Dr. Gayla Rogers for their support in this endeavour. We would also like to thank Mary Johnston of the Public Health Agency of Canada FASD Initiative and her team for all their effort in bringing this work to final publication. We would also like to acknowledge The CanNorthwest FASD Research Network, Dr. Sterling Clarren, Dr. Amy Salmon, Nancy Poole, Dr. Deborah Rutman and others working in the area of exploring FASD and adult diagnosis, the implications, and charting future directions nationally and internationally.
- For more information, contact the Division of Childhood and Adolescence
